title: Manufacturing Engineer - CEAT Tyres Capital India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - CEAT Tyres Capital India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
CEAT Tyres Capital India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About CEAT Tyres Capital India:
CEAT Tyres Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
